text.title: PM + Tech-Lead Grooming Agenda Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure that walks an operator from trigger to validated artefact. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where applicable) a decision gate that stops the flow on policy violation.

step.name: snapshot-inputs
step.action: Pull all three as of grooming day.

step.name: frame-priorities
step.action: Rank top N items by evidence + value.

step.name: balance-capacity
step.action: Run sum vs capacity; resolve overflow with named tradeoff.
